# Sentinel X

> Nigeria's Home of Mobile Esports — where gamers compete, connect, and transact safely.

Sentinel X is a mobile esports platform built for competitive mobile gamers in Nigeria, starting with Dream League Soccer and expanding to other mobile games over time.

## What you can do on Sentinel X

- Compete — Register for tournaments, get placed into groups or a knockout bracket, and play scheduled matches. Winners submit proof of results for admin verification before standings update.
- Watch — Sentinel X TV streams live matches and hosts highlights, finals, and replays.
- Community — Discuss, share, and connect with other Nigerian mobile esports players.
- Trade — Buy and sell gaming accounts, coins, and gear on the Gaming Exchange, protected by Zolarux escrow.

## Key pages

- /tournaments — browse live, open, and upcoming tournaments
- /rankings — the Sentinel X leaderboard
- /hall-of-fame — season champions and award winners
- /tv — live streams, highlights, and replays
- /exchange — the Gaming Exchange marketplace
- /community — player discussions and announcements
- /players/{username} — individual player profiles and stats

## Player reputation: Sentinel Score

Every player has a Sentinel Score from 0-100 (starting at 70) that reflects match conduct and reliability, shown on their profile with a tier badge — Elite, Trusted, Developing, or At Risk.

## Contact

Sentinel X is based in Nigeria. A link to the Sentinel X WhatsApp community is in the site header.
